description_long: This object is a modern tablet device, specifically an Apple iPad Pro, presented within a sleek, rectangular white box. The tablet features a large, vibrant display with an abstract, colorful artwork, dominated by orange, black, and teal hues. The box is minimalist, with the 'iPad Pro' label and Apple logo printed on the side, and the tablet fits snugly inside, surrounded by a thin white bezel. The screen is flat and glossy, occupying most of the front surface, while the bezel is uniform and slim, enhancing the device's premium appearance. No physical buttons or ports are visible on the exposed surfaces, emphasizing a clean and seamless design. The packaging and device together suggest a high-end consumer electronic product, likely constructed from metal, glass, and plastic.
description: A sleek Apple iPad Pro tablet in a minimalist white box, featuring a large, vibrant display with a slim bezel and no visible buttons.
description_view_0: Side and top view showing the tablet's thin profile and the snug fit within the white box, with the colorful screen partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full display of the tablet, the vivid artwork, and the uniform white bezel within the box.
description_view_2: Opposite side and top view, again showing the tablet's thinness and the edge of the display artwork inside the box.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the box with the 'iPad Pro' label and Apple logo clearly visible, no screen or tablet details shown.
attribute_screen_presence: Yes, a large rectangular screen occupies most of the front surface, centered within a slim bezel.
attribute_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, uniform, white, and symmetrical on all sides, with slightly rounded corners.
attribute_brand_logo: Yes, the Apple logo is visible on the side of the box, printed in black next to the 'iPad Pro' label.
